'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 83''' was the eighty-third issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[July 30]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Operation Skyhook|Rebel Campaign against the Death Star]]
*[[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lords of the Sith]]
*[[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]
*[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]
*[[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing]]
*[[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] - Burnt Ruins
*[[M-TD|Em Teedee]] [[Protocol droid/Legends|Protocol Droid]] (MTD)
*[[Tusken/Legends|Tusken]] [[Gaderffii/Legends|Weaponry]]
*[[Golan Arms/Legends|Golan Arms]] [[DF.9/Legends|DF.9]] Anti-Infantry Battery
*[[Magnaline 3000 airbus|Coruscant Air Bus]]
